title: How to write a good AI prompt for personal finance
description: There's a good and bad way to write effective artificial intelligence prompts for personal finance advice.
content:

title: Fadnavis calls for AI use to ensure uninterrupted power supply amid peak summer demand
description: Mumbai, Apr 18 (PTI) Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis on Saturday directed the energy department to leverage artificial intelligence (AI) to ensure uninterrupted power generation and supply, particularly during peak summer demand and the upcoming monsoon season. Chairing a review meeting on electricity demand and distribution, Fadnavis said all agencies must take measures on war-footing […]

title: AI to Power Up Maharashtra's Energy Sector
description: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis has ordered the use of artificial intelligence to ensure stable electricity supply. This initiative focuses on efficient management and timely repairs to minimize disruptions, particularly during peak summer and monsoon seasons, ensuring system resilience and sufficient power generation using coal and rooftop solar solutions.
